doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: fabricated
reason: The European Data Protection Board has not issued any such document under the reference 01/2025, and official guidance on this topic is still governed by legacy WP29 opinions.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The European Data Protection Board (EDPB) has not released a document titled "Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation"; the most recent relevant guidance remains the long-standing Opinion 05/2014 on Anonymisation Techniques.
